sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Odor Remover Pads - Pack of 4

Brand: Gyeon
Price: £16.63
Availability: In stock
Pickup available at Newcastle - Usually ready in 2 hours

Description:

Q2M ODOR REMOVER PADS

EFFECTIVE ODOUR REMOVAL PAD

Q²M Odor Remover Pads utilizes advanced technology to help reduce unpleasant odours and improve the air quality in various interiors. Whether in vehicles, boats, aircraft, or homes, it assists in maintaining a fresh environment for an extended period.

NO ODOUR MASKING!
Q²M Odor Remover Pad doesn't mask unpleasant smells like most air fresheners. Utilising active particles of our regular Odor Remover, it encapsulates them and eliminates them while being completely neutral to the interior, making it a perfect fit for automotive interiors carrying children or pets, but also in any other enclosed living areas such as home, office, boats, planes and much more.

MAKE YOUR ENVIRONEMENT THE SAFEST
With the Purify line, anti-bacterial growth and bio-hazard nuisances can be controlled effectively, without any negative impact on your health and surroundings, thanks to its 100% natural ingredients formulation. Moreover, its application is not limited to your vehicle interior - it can also be used as an effective solution in your home, office, business and much more. Unique technology used for the first time in the automotive industry brings a new standard in anti-bacterial surface protection and creates an entirely new product group which can extend the portfolio of detailing studios or car washes. This is what Purify is all about.

Image:
https://www.mycarcleaning.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/image443844087_2048x2048_ee7669cb-79d6-415c-936f-1570664dcf2f.webp

GYEON Q2M OdorRemover Pads 4pack

Price: €25.36 / 49.60лв.
Code: GYQ2MORP4
Weight: 0.000 Kgs
Availability: In stock

Gyeon Q²M OdorRemover Pad is an innovative product in the form of pads that aims to encapsulate unpleasant odors and completely remove them from any interior using unique technology.

Detailed description:
Gyeon Q²M OdorRemover Pad is an innovative product in the form of pads that aims to encapsulate unpleasant odors and completely remove them from any interior using a unique technology. Whether it is a vehicle, boat, plane or home, Gyeon Q²M OdorRemover Pad will help eliminate odors and this effect will last for several months. Using only natural ingredients and alcohol-free, it is ideal for car interiors carrying children or pets, as it does not add fragrance to the treated surface. We recommend using Q²M OdorRemover Pad only after you have first cleaned the interior. 4pcs in a set.

How to Use:
1. Clean the interior of the car thoroughly
2. Place the pad in the area with the strongest unpleasant odor. Place it upside down, attached to the hangers, as long as it is close to the contaminated area.

Website: https://gyeon.co/country/netherlands/

sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Odor Remover Pads - 4 Pack

Price: $44.99 AUD (Tax included)

Gyeon Q²M Odor Remover Pad is an effective odor removal solution that completely eliminates unpleasant smells in any interior. Utilizing advanced technology, these pads neutralize odors without masking them, making them ideal for vehicles.

Gyeon Q²M Odor Remover Pad offers a simple yet powerful solution to eliminate unpleasant odors from any enclosed space. Whether it's a vehicle, boat, aircraft, or home, these pads use the same advanced technology as Q²M Odor Remover spray to encapsulate and completely remove bad smells rather than merely masking them.

These pads are infused with active particles that neutralize odors, making them safe and effective for use in areas frequented by children or pets. Unlike traditional air fresheners, Q²M Odor Remover Pads leave your interior smelling pure and natural, without any added fragrances.

Perfect for automotive interiors but versatile enough for use in homes, offices, and other enclosed environments, these pads provide long-lasting odor removal, ensuring a fresh and clean atmosphere for months.

Best practice and pro-tips from Yves Heylen:
